name: prism
description: Prism — the proof layer for AI-generated software. Install the verification gate that sits between a coding agent finishing and the work being merged.

plugins.name: prism
plugins.description: The proof layer: independently verify AI-generated diffs against the live repo and current docs, run a decorrelated skeptic panel, and emit a Proof Packet with an accept / human-review / block verdict. Includes the auto-invoked /prism-verify skill, the full Prism command lifecycle (plan, implement, ship, feedback, retro, …), and the one-way-door Bash guard hook.
